title: Bumble Inc. (BMBL) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Results
text: Bumble Inc (BMBL) reported Q2 2024 results with total revenue of $269 million, representing 3% year-over-year growth. FX headwinds totaled $3.4 million to the topline this quarter and impacted the growth rate negatively by approximately 1.5 percentage points. Revenue growth was driven by Total Paying Users, which grew 14% to 4.1 million, offset by an 8% decrease in ARPPU to $21.37. Bumble App revenue grew 5% to $218 million, with Q2 growth driven by a 15% increase in paying users to 2.8 million. Badoo app and other revenue declined by 2% year-over-year to $51 million. Bumble beat analyst estimates for earnings per share but missed on revenue for the second quarter of 2024. The company provided guidance for at least 200 basis points year-over-year Adjusted EBITDA Margin Expansion for Full-Year 2024.
